title: Copy Row from other Excel
author: mavericklam
body:
I have a requirement to consolidated several excel file to one. Which is the best practice to copy each row to a new worksheet and keep all the style or formula? I currently use row.values to add row, but it seems many errors and it only keeps the values if it succeed. Any help?


Here is the log:
(node:5420) UnhandledPromiseRejectionWarning: Unhandled promise rejection (rejection id: 2): Error: Shared Formula maste
r must exist above and or left of clone
(node:5420) DeprecationWarning: Unhandled promise rejections are deprecated. In the future, promise rejections that are
not handled will terminate the Node.js process with a non-zero exit code.

comments.author: blackmatch
BhuvaneshwaranR
comments.body: @blackmatch it is generating a new sheet but that is malfunction. data loss is happening.
